pr.title: Record: Int6 + Canon ACD (K=3) + Muon WD 0.04 + SWA + Sliding Eval (val_bpb=1.1668)

output.summary: Pairs Canon ACD placement with mixed int6 PTQ on attention/MLP and Muon+Adam weight decay plus SWA, using sliding-window eval to track performance.
techniques: int6 PTQ applied to mlp/attn with other tensors int8
Canon ACD configuration avoiding costly B while amplifying MLP/attn effects
Muon+Adam weight decay schedule with SWA and sliding-window stride-64 evaluation
